## Affected path

- [ ] Local CSV validation
- [ ] OANDA Practice live dashboard
- [ ] Generated artifact or report

## Version and command

Package version:

Command with credential values omitted:

## Observed status

Paste the smallest sanitized error or `/api/xau/live/health` excerpt needed to reproduce the issue.

## Expected validation behavior

Describe the expected source or artifact behavior without proposing trading logic.

## Privacy and data-rights check

- [ ] I removed tokens, authorization headers, account identifiers, and private paths.
- [ ] I did not attach a complete live broker-data export.
- [ ] I verified that any attached fixture is synthetic or rights-cleared.

Read [`docs/SHARING_VALIDATION_REPORTS.md`](../../docs/SHARING_VALIDATION_REPORTS.md) before submitting.
